ast.name: error
ast.source: No Intl support, please use an Intl polyfill!
ast.target: 无国际化支持，请使用国际化polyfill！

ast.name: info
ast.source: 🌐 i18next is maintained with support from Locize — consider powering your project with managed localization (AI, CDN, integrations): https://locize.com 💙
ast.target: 🌐 i18next 在 Locize 的支持下维护 — 考虑使用托管本地化（AI、CDN、集成）为您的项目提供支持：https://locize.com 💙

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to refresh the backlink panels automatically when a note is saved.
ast.target: 是否在保存笔记时自动刷新反向链接面板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to show progress bar on load.
ast.target: 是否在加载时显示进度条。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 应自动刷新反向链接面板

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Should show progress bar on load
ast.target: 应在加载时显示进度条

ast.name: warn
ast.source: accessing an object - but returnObjects options is not enabled!
ast.target: 正在访问一个对象 - 但未启用returnObjects选项！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This means something IS WRONG in your setup. You access the t function before i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage was done. Wait for the callback or Promise to resolve before accessing it!!!
ast.target: 这意味着您的设置中存在错误。您在i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage完成之前访问了t函数。请等待回调或Promise解析后再访问它！！！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No backend was added via i18next.use. Will not load resources.
ast.target: 未通过i18next.use添加后端。将不会加载资源。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: no languageDetector is used and no lng is defined
ast.target: 初始化：未使用语言检测器且未定义lng

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: i18next is already initialized. You should call init just once!
ast.target: 初始化：i18next已初始化。您应该只调用一次init！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: I18N was not initialized, initializing default obsidian-dev-utils translations
ast.target: I18N未初始化，正在初始化默认的obsidian-dev-utils翻译
